decision_reason: Canonical package owner is retained in DEFAULT_CI and FULL_NON_NETWORK; FAST omits large canonical family.
Core observation separation is high-signal and included in FAST/DEFAULT_CI.
Bounded scope is protected by unit contracts and browser/operator routing.
No full-market scan remains a merge-protection owner.
Scanner and UI guard stay in FAST/DEFAULT_CI.
Scanner plus M5K/M5N contracts remain selected.
Path guard remains selected and operator preflight routes authoritative guard.
TLS policy unit owner remains in FAST/DEFAULT_CI.
Invalid TLS policy fail-closed owner remains selected.
MCP fail-closed and startup check remain selected.
.Legacy standalone acceptance gates are preserved in FULL_NON_NETWORK rather than assumed covered by DEFAULT_CI pytest.
.Windows compatibility smoke is restored as manual or label-gated non-network validation with strict TLS defaults.
